intro: Arachnothryx euryphylla, also known as the spider-flowered tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The health benefits of Arachnothryx euryphylla include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Arachnothryx euryphylla is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and is also used in the production of topical ointments and capsules to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
